classification.task_goal: Engage in an erotic role-playing game as a Dungeon Master.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially failed to incorporate the requested erotic elements into the role-playing game, which was a primary expectation of the user. However, the user later prompted the AI to add more adult themes, indicating a repair of the constraint violation. The AI acknowledged the need for adult themes and provided a way to incorporate them while emphasizing the importance of consent and boundaries.
